english translation text:
Next to the night of Qadr, the night of 15th of Sha’baan (also known as ‘Laylatul Baraat) is the most auspicious night.
In a hadith narrated by Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) and Imam Ja’far Sadiq(a.s.), on this night Allah(swt) has promised to fulfil the legitimate desires put forward to Him.
It is the night when Allah(swt) takes decisions in the matters of sustenance, life and death and welfare of the people.
